struct BatchProcessor {
    buffer: Vec<Record>,
    max_capacity: usize,
}

impl BatchProcessor {
    fn new(max_capacity: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            buffer: Vec::new(),
            max_capacity,
        }
    }

    fn process_batch(&mut self, records: Vec<Record>) {
        self.buffer.extend(records);
        // ... process buffer ...
        self.buffer.clear();
        // GOOD: trim capacity after spike
        if self.buffer.capacity() > self.max_capacity {
            self.buffer.shrink_to(self.max_capacity);
        }
    }
}

struct Record {
    data: Vec<u8>,
}
